anonymisationNote: Names, sites, and site-specific references are anonymised for demo. Underlying statistics are real.

confidenceNotes: 6 / 8 team members matched to TNA sheets exactly.
0 matched with a small spelling difference.
2 are not listed on any TNA sheet (no inferred required items).
TNA required-items inferred as 'everything on a person's TNA sheet(s)'. This is an over-approximation; tick-mark parsing would refine it later.

topConcerns: 2 validity bugs that may hide expiry dates
2 of 8 team members are not in any TNA
45 coverage gaps where same-role colleagues have different items
issuesSummary.description: Before you trust the numbers, here's what we found in the underlying data. Risks are tiered by impact: red = could cause a real compliance miss; amber = process fragility; green = cumulative debt (low per item, high in aggregate).

high.title: Validity bug on IPL-AU-DL1Y
high.detail: TNA validity for this item looks like a number of days entered into a months column (365, 730, or 1825). The item may be tracked as effectively never expiring.
high.suggestedAction: Verify the intended renewal period and fix the TNA cell.

high.title: Validity bug on IPL-AU-LMHWPRM
high.detail: TNA validity for this item looks like a number of days entered into a months column (365, 730, or 1825). The item may be tracked as effectively never expiring.
high.suggestedAction: Verify the intended renewal period and fix the TNA cell.

high.title: Kai Jensen has no assignment for AU-IPL-NAO-MIO-SSEAS
high.detail: TNA references this item on a sheet where this person is listed as staff, but SuccessFactors has no record of it being assigned to them.
high.suggestedAction: Confirm whether the item should be assigned and add it in the system of record.

high.title: Kai Jensen has no assignment for AU_CURR_NAO_MIO_SUP_MAN(MIO Super)
high.detail: TNA references this item on a sheet where this person is listed as staff, but SuccessFactors has no record of it being assigned to them.
high.suggestedAction: Confirm whether the item should be assigned and add it in the system of record.

high.title: Kai Jensen has no assignment for Accredited Training
high.detail: TNA references this item on a sheet where this person is listed as staff, but SuccessFactors has no record of it being assigned to them.
high.suggestedAction: Confirm whether the item should be assigned and add it in the system of record.

high.detail: TNA references this item on a sheet where this person is listed as staff, but SuccessFactors has no record of it being assigned to them.
high.suggestedAction: Confirm whether the item should be assigned and add it in the system of record.

medium.title: Coverage gap on IPL-AU-PHO-MKA within Production Manager
medium.detail: 1 of 2 people in this role have the item assigned; the others do not.
medium.suggestedAction: Decide whether the item is required for the role, then align all role-holders.

medium.title: Coverage gap on IPL-AU-NAO-MINE-PRAMKCFM within Production Manager
medium.detail: 1 of 2 people in this role have the item assigned; the others do not.
medium.suggestedAction: Decide whether the item is required for the role, then align all role-holders.

medium.title: + 37 more coverage gaps within the team
medium.detail: Other same-role pairs where one person has an item and another doesn't.
medium.suggestedAction: Filter the drill-down to see the full list.

medium.title: Avery Davis is not on any TNA
medium.detail: We can show this person's actual assignments, but the TNA has no row identifying what they should have.
medium.suggestedAction: Add the person to the appropriate TNA sheet, or confirm they're intentionally out of scope.

medium.title: Pat Nelson is not on any TNA
medium.detail: We can show this person's actual assignments, but the TNA has no row identifying what they should have.
medium.suggestedAction: Add the person to the appropriate TNA sheet, or confirm they're intentionally out of scope.

low.title: Cumulative spelling drift across the underlying data
low.detail: Project-wide, ~109 item-name spellings are 95-99% similar to a canonical name (likely typos), and ~8 'Technicain' / 'Technician' role-title variants exist. None block compliance today, but they break joins, audits, and future automation.
low.suggestedAction: Run a supervised typo-fix pass against the analysis workbooks (~1 day).
